name: Amaran SM5c LED Light Strip
description: Set the ideal lighting ambiance in your space with the 16.4' multicolor SM5c LED Light Strip from amaran. Thanks to Bluetooth and Wi-Fi connectivity, a hub is not required to operate this strip.

features.Key Features:: Smart LED Light Strip | 16.4' Length | 3200 to 6500K Color Temperature | 300 RGB LEDs Enable Customized Lighting | Built-In Microphone | Bluetooth & Wi-Fi Wireless Connectivity | Flexible Flat Cable | Extendable to 32.8' | Sidus Link App for iOS & Android | Use with Amazon Alexa & Google Assistant
features.What's in The Box?: amaran SM5c LED Light Strip (16.4', Multicolor) | AC Power Supply | LED Controller | Double-Sided Tape | Cleaning Kit
